Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
Jiffy Lube Live
Bristow, VA
Previous Names:
Nissan Pavilion at Stone Ridge (Changed after 2009)
Seating Capacity: 25000
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 26
  DMB  (24)
  Dave & Tim  (1)
  Dave solo  (1)

Longest Performance:
08.08.09 - #41 (21:07)

Song Liberations
  6.28.08 – Space Between, The (after 1446 days)
  7.27.13 – Old Dirt Hill (Bring That Beat Back) (after 1784 days)
Venue Picture
Description
This venue is located very close to where the Second Battle of Manassas/Bull Run (Civil War) took place. The venue had a Manassas, VA, address through 1998 and changed to Bristow in 1999.

It was the last venue LeRoi Moore played before he died, and the venue now has a plaque commemorating him.

7800 Cellar Door Dr.
Bristow, VA 20136

Songs that made their debut at this venue:
Ring of Fire (9.13.03)
Sledgehammer (6.28.08)
